series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Emergency Management Agency - Exercise Records
series_metadata.series_description: All records related to exercises of any part of the state emergency operations plan or other emergency response plans, including but not limited to manuals, program/exercise guidance, exercise scenarios, evaluations, notes, correspondence, after-action reports, corrective action reports, and corresponding presentation materials.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current year plus three years from the date of the federal "Final Financial Report" for the applicable federal grant, and then, until no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain current year plus three years from the date of the federal "Final Financial Report" for the applicable federal grant, and then, until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
